probes.name: runtime-probe.js (builder script on runtime.html)
probes.details: 13 assertions; 13 PASS, 0 FAIL. Assertion 7 (per-exercise data-status isolation) previously failed due to test-ordering artifact — assertion 6 left exercise 1 status as 'pass' from a successful runSubmission(). Fixed: assertion 7 now resets exercise 1 to 'idle' before the isolation check, so it tests real cross-exercise leakage rather than stale state.
